easy.ticket: Customer: Hi, I forgot my account password and cannot log in. Can you help me reset it?
Customer: My 2FA isn't working and I am locked out of my account. Help!
Customer: How do I change my profile picture?

medium.ticket: Customer: I was just charged twice for my subscription this month ($20 instead of $10). This is unacceptable, I want a refund right away!
Customer: I am trying to upgrade my plan to Pro, but it keeps declining my payment method, which is valid.
Customer: The new reporting feature isn't exporting my data to CSV, I need this for a presentation tomorrow.

hard.ticket: Customer: When I try to start the database server, it crashes with 'Error Code 501: Shared memory allocation failed'. I am in the middle of a critical deployment.
Customer: Our production application is throwing random 'Too many connections' exceptions and users are dropping off.
Customer: Half our office can't reach the internal network starting this morning. It just says TLS handshake timeout.
